title: Auraglow Solar Security Flood Light, PIR Motion Sensor for Home Security, IP54 Waterproof, Outdoor Wall Mountable, Adjustable Angle, SPV Lighting for Garden, Patio, Pathway, Fence, Driveway (1 Pack)
features: Eco-Friendly Power Source: A compact, outdoor, purely solar powered security floodlight for the garden, front door, driveway, pathway, balcony or terrace. No mains power required.

Motion Detection for Home Security: The PIR motion sensor provides 30 seconds of flood lighting from the last heat source detected at a distance of up to six metres away. It turns on when motion is detected, startling unwanted visitors.
Integrated efficient rechargeable battery: A high-capacity solar-powered battery provides up to 130 activations per night / per full charge.

IP54 Weatherproof Rating: As well as featuring 28 bright LEDs offering 850 lumens of 6000K Daylight White high-intensity illumination, the Floodlight is IP54 weatherproof rated and durably designed, ready for life outdoors for years to come.

Easy installation and a variety of applications: No electrician or wiring required, the Auraglow Solar Flood Light can be mounted to a wall or fence or used freestanding. The angles of both the light and the solar panel can also be adjusted, for greater control.
description: Product Description Auraglow Solar Security Flood Light The Auraglow Solar Security Flood Light is a compact, outdoor, purely solar powered security floodlight for the garden, front door, driveway, pathway, balcony or terrace. Efficient Lighting for Outside Your Home The Auraglow Solar Security Flood Light offers exceptional, efficient lighting for any outside space. Solar Power Source Make use of the sun's energy to charge the built-in lithium-ion battery and rest easy knowing your property's exterior is equipped with a motion-activated security light. Motion Detection for Home Security The Solar Security Flood Light offers up to 130 activations per night / per full charge, so it's always ready to activate on any unwanted visitors or to light your way when outside in the dark. IP54 Weatherproof Rating Its IP54 weatherproof rating and durable build mean it is ready for life outdoors. The integrated solar panel enables the battery to always recharge during daylight. The light is equipped with a daylight sensor, so it will only operate between dusk and dawn, while the PIR motion sensor activates the light and stays on for 30 seconds after the last heat source is detected up to a distance of six metres. With 28 bright 6000k Daylight White LEDs, the floodlight offers high-intensity illumination for a wide area in a compact package, ideal for mounting on small wall spaces, fences or where a bulkier light fitting is not required. Specifications Construction Glass lens with ABS and steel Super-Bright LEDs 28 x 0.5W SMD 2835 Rechargeable Battery 2600mAh Li-Ion Activation Time 30 seconds from last heat source detection Detection Distance 4-6 metres Brightness 850lm Colour Temperature 6000K Daylight White Weatherproof Rating IP54 Dimensions 147mm width x 165mm height x 116mm depth Weight 383g
